# registerGetCoffeesTool()

> **Tool Layer**

```ts
function registerGetCoffeesTool(server: McpServer, controller: GetCoffeesControllerClass): void;
```

Defined in: [coffee/get-coffees/tool/get-coffees.tool.ts:22](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/coffee/get-coffees/tool/get-coffees.tool.ts#L22)

Registers the `get-coffees` MCP tool on the server.

## Parameters

| Parameter    | Type                                                                                                              | Description                                   |
| ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| `server`     | `McpServer`                                                                                                       | The MCP server to register the tool on.       |
| `controller` | [`GetCoffeesControllerClass`](../../../controller/get-coffees.controller/interfaces/GetCoffeesControllerClass.md) | The controller that handles tool invocations. |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Registers a tool named `"get-coffees"` that returns a list of all
available coffees. This tool has no input parameters.

## See

[GetCoffeesControllerClass](../../../controller/get-coffees.controller/interfaces/GetCoffeesControllerClass.md) for the handler contract.
